title: Villager Tweaks
description: Take control of villager mechanics with simple config options like infinite trades, wandering trader toggles, cure discount scaling, and restock timing.
body:
# Villager Tweaks Plus

Villagers are powerful, annoying, and badly balanced depending on your world. This lets you fix that.

Villager Tweaks Plus gives you direct control over several high-impact villager mechanics, making it ideal for SMP balance, admin control, and custom progression.

## Features
- Infinite trades option
- Disable wandering traders
- Change wandering trader spawn interval
- Scale cure discounts
- Adjust trade refresh timing
- Change breeding cooldown
- Adjust reputation/gossip caps

## Server/client
- Server-side friendly
- Clients do not need the mod installed when used on a server

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
